heading: Minimum real estate interest
label: 598b Minimum real estate interest
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 1002 of div. A of Pub. L. 118–272section 2201 of this title

children.heading: Real estate plan
children.label: a Real estate plan
children.text: The Secretary shall provide to the non-Federal interest for an authorized water resources development project a real estate plan for the project that includes a description of the real estate interests required for construction, operation and maintenance, repair, rehabilitation, or replacement of the project, including any specific details and legal requirements necessary for implementation of the project.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For each authorized water resources development project for which an interest in real property is required for any applicable construction, operation and maintenance, repair, rehabilitation, or replacement, the Secretary shall identify the minimum interest in the property necessary to carry out the applicable activity.

children.label: A
children.text: such an interest is sufficient for construction, operation and maintenance, repair, rehabilitation, and replacement of the applicable project; and

children.label: B
children.text: the non-Federal interest cannot legally make available to the Secretary an interest in fee simple title for purposes of the project.

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: c Requirement
children.text: The non-Federal interest for an authorized water resources development project shall provide for the project an interest in the applicable real property that is the minimum interest identified under subsection (b).

a summary of all instances in which the Secretary identified under subsection (b) fee simple title as the minimum interest necessary with respect to an activity for which the non-Federal interest requested the use of an interest less than fee simple title; and
with respect to each such instance, a description of the legal requirements that resulted in identifying fee simple title as the minimum interest.

children.heading: Existing agreements
children.label: e Existing agreements
children.text: At the request of a non-Federal interest, an agreement entered into under between the Secretary and the non-Federal interest before , may be amended to reflect the requirements of this section.section 1962d–5b of title 42January 4, 2025
